gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/52)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/52)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ لِلْقَائِمِ غَيْبَةً قَبْلَ أَنْ يَقُومَ إِنَّهُ يَخَافُ وَ أَوْمَأَ بِيَدِهِ إِلَى بَطْنِهِ يَعْنِي الْقَتْلَ .

en.hubeali: And by this chain, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from his father Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Zurara who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘For Al-Qaim<sup>asws</sup>, there would be an Occultation before he<sup>asws</sup> arises. He<sup>asws</sup> would fear’, and he<sup>asws</sup> gestured by his<sup>asws</sup> hand towards his<sup>asws</sup> belly, meaning the murder’.
en.sarwar: 18. Through the same chain of narrators it is narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from his father, Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from ibn Bukayr from Zurara who has said the following. “ Al-Qa’im (the one who will rise with Divine Authority) will disappear before he will rise with divine power. He will suffer fear. The Imam (a.s.) pointed to his midsection, meaning thereby being murdered.”
